seo_title: Subnautica 2 on GeForce NOW: Cloud Gaming and PC Gaming Convergence
meta_description: GeForce NOW brings Subnautica 2 to the cloud, allowing players to access the game from almost any device. Learn more about this cloud gaming milestone.
body_html:
Subnautica 2 is now available on GeForce NOW, allowing players to access the game from almost any device.

11 New Games Joining GeForce NOW This Week

  • New games include HITMAN World of Assassination and Forza Horizon 6
  • Play for free through May 25 for limited-time rewards
  • GeForce NOW members can jump in once early access becomes available

Subnautica 2: A Shared-World Ocean Frontier

Jump into a shared-world ocean frontier in Subnautica 2, where survival, exploration and creativity rise to the surface together.

  • Every reef, trench and stormy horizon is crafted to be swum through, studied and slowly tamed as players chart their own course beneath alien waves
  • Descend into a living seascape of dynamic ecosystems, mysterious ruins and creatures that range from curious to colossal
  • Take on story-driven missions, dive into resource-rich biomes and construct bases above and below the surface to turn hostile waters into a home

GeForce NOW: Turning PC Gaming Collections into Play-Anywhere Experiences

It all highlights what GeForce NOW does best: turning PC gaming collections into play-anywhere experiences across devices, with no install, updates or the latest hardware required.

"We're excited to bring Subnautica 2 and other new games to GeForce NOW, allowing our members to access their favorite titles from anywhere." - [Name], NVIDIA

source.title: Sea You in the Cloud: ‘Subnautica 2’ Early Access Dives Onto GeForce NOW
source.summary: Editor’s note: The Gaijin single sign-on feature is now up and running. Dive masks on — Subnautica 2 is making a splash on GeForce NOW day-and-date with launch, so members can plunge into the title’s brand-new alien ocean from almost any device. It leads 11 new games joining the cloud this week. A limited-time HITMAN […]
